name: Unnamed Project

files.filename: 创新研报｜2024年315全媒体舆情分析与品牌洞察报告_Wisers_2024.pdf

entity_types.name: GovernmentAgency
entity_types.description: Government departments responsible for regulation and enforcement.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Official full name of the government agency.

attributes.name: jurisdiction
attributes.description: Geographic or functional area of authority.

examples: 深圳市市场监督管理局

entity_types.name: MediaOutlet
entity_types.description: News organizations that report and shape public opinion.

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Name of the media organization.

attributes.name: platform_type
attributes.description: Type of media platform (e.g., newspaper, TV, social media).

entity_types.name: Company
entity_types.description: Commercial enterprises involved in production, sales, or services.

attributes.name: company_name
attributes.description: Registered name of the company.

attributes.name: industry
attributes.description: Primary industry or sector of operation.

entity_types.name: ConsumerAdvocate
entity_types.description: Individuals or groups actively voicing consumer rights concerns.

attributes.name: advocate_name
attributes.description: Name or alias of the advocate.

attributes.name: focus_area
attributes.description: Primary consumer issue they focus on (e.g., food safety, finance).

entity_types.name: SocialMediaInfluencer
entity_types.description: Individuals with significant online followings who influence public discourse.

attributes.name: handle
attributes.description: Social media username or handle.

attributes.name: follower_count
attributes.description: Approximate number of followers.

entity_types.name: IndustryAssociation
entity_types.description: Formal associations representing specific industries or sectors.

attributes.name: association_name
attributes.description: Official name of the industry association.

attributes.name: sector
attributes.description: Industry sector it represents.

entity_types.name: AcademicExpert
entity_types.description: Scholars or researchers providing expert commentary on public issues.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Full name of the academic expert.

attributes.name: affiliation
attributes.description: University or research institution they are affiliated with.

entity_types.name: PlatformOperator
entity_types.description: Operators of digital platforms where content or commerce occurs.

attributes.name: platform_name
attributes.description: Name of the digital platform operated.

attributes.name: business_model
attributes.description: Primary business model (e.g., e-commerce, social network).

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Any individual person not covered by more specific types.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Full name of the person.

attributes.name: occupation
attributes.description: General occupation or role.

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Any organization not covered by more specific types.

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Name of the organization.

attributes.name: org_type
attributes.description: General category of organization.

edge_types.name: REGULATES
edge_types.description: Agency regulates an entity's activities or products.

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Media outlet reports on an entity or event.

edge_types.name: COMMENTED_BY
edge_types.description: Entity is commented on or criticized by another entity.

edge_types.name: AFFILIATED_WITH
edge_types.description: Individual or entity is formally associated with an organization.

edge_types.name: REPRESENTS
edge_types.description: Entity represents interests of a group or industry.

edge_types.name: RESPONDS_TO
edge_types.description: Entity issues official response to criticism or event.

analysis_summary: 文本聚焦‘糟心肉’事件引发的舆论风暴，涉及政府监管、媒体报道、企业回应、消费者声讨等多方互动。实体设计需覆盖可发声主体：监管机构、媒体、涉事企业、消费者代表、意见领袖、平台方等，并保留兜底类型以涵盖未分类个体或组织。关系设计强调监管、报道、评论、回应等社媒互动行为，支撑舆论模拟推演。
simulation_requirement: 预测“糟心肉”事件对预制菜国标出台的推动力：推演在平行世界中，当“梅菜扣肉”涉及淋巴肉曝光后，公众对“预制菜”标签的集体排斥感及信任修复周期。
